title: Close the chain and prove the whole tree green
action: Per D18/D24 and PAT37. Earlier cells each owned their own regen, so this cell CONFIRMS rather than repairs. Run: (1) `node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs`; (2) `node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply`; (3) `node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write`; (4) confirm .bee/bin/bee.mjs matches skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs byte for byte — scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs does NOT check that pair (scripts/test_native_probe.mjs:355-357). Then the FULL verify, output recorded verbatim. DIFF CRITERION, scoped: .bee/onboarding.json's `updated_at` is rewritten unconditionally on every --apply (onboard_bee.mjs:3326), so it ALWAYS differs and is not a finding. A diff in any OTHER file from steps 1-3 means an earlier cell left its own regen undone — report it as a finding with the file names. Measured baseline for comparison: 84 suites, exit 0, ~63.6s wall at concurrency 5; the feature adds five suites, so expect ~89.

truths: `node scripts/run_verify.mjs` exits 0 with its output recorded verbatim.
A fresh onboarding dry-run reports no drift.
Whether steps 1-3 produced a diff in any file other than .bee/onboarding.json's updated_at is reported explicitly, with file names if so.
artifacts: Confirmed plugin trees, manifest and ledger, plus the recorded full-verify output
prohibitions: Do not cap on a partial verify.
Do not report the updated_at churn as a finding, and do not let it mask a real one.

trace.outcome: Confirmed chain: render_plugin_skill_trees, onboard --apply, release_manifest --write all produced no diff beyond onboarding.json's expected updated_at churn; .bee/bin/bee.mjs matches skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs byte-for-byte (sha256 5d07617d...). Full verify: 89/89 suites, exit 0, wall 71.3s. No findings from earlier cells' regen chains — this cell confirms, no repair needed.
